title: vriesea hygrometrica
intro: Vriesea hygrometrica, also known as Tiger's Breath or Resurrection Plant, is a type of epiphytic bromeliad that belongs to the family Bromeliaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vriesea hygrometrica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
